title: CBIC Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 172 Additional Assistant Director Posts
description: The Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 172 Additional Assistant Director Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree can apply for the CBIC Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection proc...
